# barracudawaf_admin_ip_range (Resource)

`barracudawaf_admin_ip_range` manages `Admin IP Range` on the Barracuda Web Application Firewall.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "barracudawaf_admin_ip_range" "demo_admin_ip_range" {
    ip_address = "192.168.10.0"
    netmask    = "255.255.255.0"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- **ip_address** (String) New IP Address
- **netmask** (String) Subnet Mask

### Optional

- **id** (String) The ID of this resource.
